discovery.name: PRJ_TEMPLATE
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT p.segment1 AS TNUM, p.name AS TNAME, ou.name AS ORGNAME, p.project_currency_code AS CUR, (SELECT pt.project_type FROM pjf_project_types_vl pt WHERE pt.project_type_id = p.project_type_id) AS PTYPE FROM pjf_projects_all_vl p JOIN hr_all_organization_units_vl ou ON ou.organization_id = p.carrying_out_organization_id WHERE p.template_flag = 'Y' AND p.project_currency_code = 'USD' AND REGEXP_LIKE(p.segment1, '^[ -~]+$') AND REGEXP_LIKE(ou.name, '^[A-Za-z0-9 _/.-]+$') AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE(p.segment1, '^[0-9]{8,}$') AND UPPER(p.segment1) NOT LIKE '%DO NOT USE%' AND UPPER(p.name) NOT LIKE '%DO NOT USE%' ORDER BY DECODE(UPPER(p.segment1),'PRGUS SPONSORED',0,1), p.segment1) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: PRJ_MANAGER_1
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT pn.display_name AS PNAME, ea.email_address AS EMAIL FROM per_all_people_f pp JOIN per_person_names_f pn ON pn.person_id = pp.person_id AND pn.name_type = 'GLOBAL' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN pn.effective_start_date AND pn.effective_end_date JOIN per_email_addresses ea ON ea.person_id = pp.person_id AND ea.email_type = 'W1' WHERE TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN pp.effective_start_date AND pp.effective_end_date AND ea.email_address LIKE '%oraclepdemos.com' AND REGEXP_LIKE(pn.display_name, '^[ -~]+$') AND REGEXP_LIKE(ea.email_address, '^[ -~]+$') ORDER BY pp.person_number) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: PRJ_MANAGER_2
discovery.sql: SELECT PNAME, EMAIL FROM (SELECT pn.display_name AS PNAME, ea.email_address AS EMAIL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pp.person_number) AS RN FROM per_all_people_f pp JOIN per_person_names_f pn ON pn.person_id = pp.person_id AND pn.name_type = 'GLOBAL' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN pn.effective_start_date AND pn.effective_end_date JOIN per_email_addresses ea ON ea.person_id = pp.person_id AND ea.email_type = 'W1' WHERE TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN pp.effective_start_date AND pp.effective_end_date AND ea.email_address LIKE '%oraclepdemos.com' AND REGEXP_LIKE(pn.display_name, '^[ -~]+$') AND REGEXP_LIKE(ea.email_address, '^[ -~]+$')) WHERE RN = 2

base_read.sql: SELECT segment1 AS PROJECT_NUMBER, project_id AS PROJECT_ID, name AS PROJECT_NAME FROM pjf_projects_all_vl WHERE segment1 LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-PRJ-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT project_number AS PROJECT_NUMBER, 'IMPORT_STATUS=' || NVL(import_status,'(null)') || ' LOAD_STATUS=' || NVL(load_status,'(null)') AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM pjf_projects_all_xface WHERE load_request_id = :LRID
